indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX amendment_admin_alter_events_pkey ON amendment.amendment_admin_alter_events USING btree (event_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_amendment_alter_alter_id ON amendment.amendment_admin_alter_events USING btree (alter_id, created_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_amendment_alter_resource ON amendment.amendment_admin_alter_events USING btree (amendment_id, created_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX amendments_pkey ON amendment.amendments USING btree (amendment_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_amendment_original_filing_version ON amendment.amendments USING btree (original_filing_id, new_assessment_version)
CREATE INDEX idx_amendment_taxpayer_period ON amendment.amendments USING btree (taxpayer_id, tax_period_end)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX assessments_pkey ON assessment.assessments USING btree (assessment_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_assessment_assessed_at ON assessment.assessments USING btree (assessed_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_assessment_filing_id ON assessment.assessments USING btree (filing_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_assessment_taxpayer_period ON assessment.assessments USING btree (taxpayer_id, tax_period_end)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_assessment_filing_version ON assessment.assessments USING btree (filing_id, assessment_version)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX evidence_entries_pkey ON audit.evidence_entries USING btree (evidence_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_event_timestamp ON audit.evidence_entries USING btree (event_timestamp DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_filing_id ON audit.evidence_entries USING btree (filing_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_trace_id ON audit.evidence_entries USING btree (trace_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_auth_refresh_active ON auth.refresh_tokens USING btree (expires_at) WHERE (revoked_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_auth_refresh_subject ON auth.refresh_tokens USING btree (subject_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX refresh_tokens_pkey ON auth.refresh_tokens USING btree (refresh_token)
CREATE INDEX idx_auth_users_taxpayer_scope_taxpayer ON auth.users USING btree (taxpayer_scope) WHERE (role = 'taxpayer'::text)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_auth_users_taxpayer_scope_taxpayer ON auth.users USING btree (taxpayer_scope) WHERE ((role = 'taxpayer'::text) AND (taxpayer_scope IS NOT NULL))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON auth.users USING btree (subject_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_username_key ON auth.users USING btree (username)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX claim_intents_idempotency_key_key ON claim.claim_intents USING btree (idempotency_key)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX claim_intents_pkey ON claim.claim_intents USING btree (claim_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_claim_dispatch_window ON claim.claim_intents USING btree (next_retry_at, created_at) WHERE (status = ANY (ARRAY['queued'::text, 'failed'::text]))
CREATE INDEX idx_claim_status ON claim.claim_intents USING btree (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_claim_taxpayer_period ON claim.claim_intents USING btree (taxpayer_id, tax_period_end)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX filing_admin_alter_events_pkey ON filing.filing_admin_alter_events USING btree (event_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_filing_alter_alter_id ON filing.filing_admin_alter_events USING btree (alter_id, created_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_filing_alter_resource ON filing.filing_admin_alter_events USING btree (filing_id, created_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX filings_pkey ON filing.filings USING btree (filing_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_filing_state ON filing.filings USING btree (state)
CREATE INDEX idx_filing_submission_ts ON filing.filings USING btree (submission_timestamp DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_filing_taxpayer_period ON filing.filings USING btree (taxpayer_id, tax_period_end)
CREATE INDEX idx_obligation_due_date ON obligation.obligations USING btree (due_date)
CREATE INDEX idx_obligation_period_end ON obligation.obligations USING btree (tax_period_end)
CREATE INDEX idx_obligation_taxpayer ON obligation.obligations USING btree (taxpayer_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX obligations_pkey ON obligation.obligations USING btree (obligation_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_preliminary_obligation_id ON obligation.preliminary_assessments USING btree (obligation_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_preliminary_taxpayer_period ON obligation.preliminary_assessments USING btree (taxpayer_id, tax_period_end)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX preliminary_assessments_pkey ON obligation.preliminary_assessments USING btree (preliminary_assessment_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_registration_cvr ON registration.registrations USING btree (cvr_number)
CREATE INDEX idx_registration_latest_effective ON registration.registrations USING btree (taxpayer_id, status, registered_at DESC, created_at DESC, registration_id DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_registration_taxpayer_cvr ON registration.registrations USING btree (taxpayer_id, cvr_number)
CREATE INDEX idx_registration_taxpayer ON registration.registrations USING btree (taxpayer_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX registrations_pkey ON registration.registrations USING btree (registration_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_registration_single_active_taxpayer ON registration.registrations USING btree (taxpayer_id) WHERE (status = ANY (ARRAY['pending_registration'::text, 'registered'::text]))

triggers.trigger_def: CREATE TRIGGER prevent_evidence_entries_modification BEFORE DELETE OR UPDATE ON audit.evidence_entries FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION audit.prevent_row_modification()

functions.function_def: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION audit.prevent_row_modification() RETURNS trigger LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $function$ BEGIN RAISE EXCEPTION 'Append-only table: % does not allow %', TG_TABLE_NAME, TG_OP; END; $function$
